description: Prepare a standard IMO-format pilot card and a matching Solent pilotage approach scenario using the largest vessel model (by length or displacement) found in /opt/bridgecommand/Models/. Extract technical specifications from the chosen model's ownship.ini to create a pilot card document at /home/ga/Documents/pilot_card.txt containing Sections A-F (Ship Particulars, Propulsion, Maneuvering, Anchoring, Bridge Eqpt, Comms) per IMO Resolution A.960, including a reference to the source model directory. Create a new scenario at /opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/p) Solent Pilotage Approach/ featuring this vessel configured for a daytime approach (Start ~08:00, Vis > 8nm) starting near the Nab Tower (Lat ~50.67, Long ~-0.95) with at least 2 traffic vessels. Ensure instruments are visible by setting hide_instruments=0 in /opt/bridgecommand/bc5.ini.
